mapper.sql:
main.*,( SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG( JSON_OBJECT('sc', s.sc, 'tc', s.tc, 'type', s.type) ) FROM NC.${dialect}_word_similar s WHERE s.word_id = main.id ) AS similar
FROM NC.${dialect}_word main LEFT JOIN NC.${dialect}_word_similar similar ON main.id = similar.word_id LEFT JOIN NC.${dialect}_word_similar similar_field ON main.id = similar_field.word_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE ( main.sc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') OR main.tc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') ) AND special < 2 GROUP BY main.id

SELECT
WHERE ( main.sc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') OR main.tc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') OR similar.sc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') OR similar.tc like concat('%', #{ciyu}, '%') ) AND special < 2 GROUP BY main.id

SELECT
WHERE main.id = #{id} AND special < 2 GROUP BY main.id
